news.t: The 7 Best SPDR ETFs to Buy and Hold

holdings.infoBox: CWI is an equity ETF with a total of 1180 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.80%, Samsung Electronics at 2.98%, SK hynix at 2.46%, ASML Holding at 2.04%, and HSBC Holdings at 0.95%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI ACWI ex-US ETF (CWI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC World ex USA index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap global stocks outside the US. CWI was launched on Jan 10, 2007 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: The 7 Best SPDR ETFs to Buy and Hold
data.text: State Street's job as an investment manager is to get you from point A to point B with as little pain as possible, and hopefully, plenty of assets in your retirement portfolio. And to its credit, many...
